Codex HSOG student bundle

Contents
- codex-hsog
- start-codex-hsog.sh

Quick start
1. Open a terminal in this folder.
2. Run: ./start-codex-hsog.sh
3. Enter your HSOG API key when prompted.

Notes
- The launcher only sets the HSOG provider for this run.
- If HSOG_API_KEY is already set in your shell, the launcher reuses it.
- You can pass normal Codex arguments to the launcher, for example:
  ./start-codex-hsog.sh --help
